generated_oml:
// Sensors on the Physical Twin
instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑10LX LiDAR providing point cloud data on the vehicle chassis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PointCloudStream
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera delivering depth imagery onboard the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageStream
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor outputting real‑time speed values."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedStream
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor tracking the steering mechanism state."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleStream
]

// Physical‑to‑Virtual Transmissions over ROS2 DDS via Wi‑Fi
instance PointCloudStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
    base:desc "Serialized point cloud transmitted to the Digital Twin using ROS2 DDS over Wi‑Fi."
]

instance DepthImageStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
    base:desc "Depth image data streamed to the Digital Twin via ROS2 DDS."
]

instance VehicleSpeedStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
    base:desc "Vehicle speed telemetry sent to the Digital Twin using ROS2 DDS."
]

instance SteeringAngleStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
    base:desc "Steering angle telemetry transmitted to the Digital Twin via ROS2 DDS."
]

// Data objects that are the next step in the flow
instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data received by the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PointCloudStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image from Intel D435i received by the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]

instance SpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data received by the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllerFE
]

instance SteeringData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data received by the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllerFE
]

// Functional Enablers
instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Functional Entity serializing raw sensor streams and performing unit conversions before collection."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Collection Functional Entity implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter tracking for object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControllerFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control Functional Entity executing lead‑vehicle detection and speed control per ISO 15622."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ReportGenerationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Report Generation Functional Entity producing real‑time performance metrics and temporal summaries."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance RemoteManagementFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote Management Functional Entity handling enable/disable ACC, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// Data Models
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model applied to raw point cloud data for obstacle grouping."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking model estimating trajectories of tracked clusters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]

instance ACCAlgorithmModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC controller algorithm implementing lead‑vehicle detection and speed set‑point calculation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllerFE
]

instance RViz3DVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization mesh model for vehicle and environment used by the Data Monitoring service."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

// Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time UI displaying vehicle speed, steering angle, projected driving path, and object tracks; provides reports and data export."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimePerformanceMetricsInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceLogInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalTrendInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides RVizVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC decision logic from vehicle to the Digital Twin, using ACC controller FE."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCAssessmentInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web‑based control panel enabling ACC enable/disable, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDisableAction
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustDesiredSpeedAction
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakeAction
]

// Insights
instance RealTimePerformanceMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time performance metrics of the ACC system shown on the operator UI."
]

instance TraceLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trace logs of ACC decisions and sensor data for debugging."
]

instance HistoricalTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trend analysis of ACC performance over time extracted from the SQL database."
]

instance RVizVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live 3‑D visualization of vehicle and detected obstacles."
]

instance ACCAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of ACC effectiveness during autonomous operation."
]

// Actions
instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to enable Adaptive Cruise Control via the remote web panel."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to disable Adaptive Cruise Control via the remote web panel."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust the target speed for ACC through the web interface."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual or automated emergency brake command transmitted to the vehicle's ESC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Acting Components for the Physical Twin
instance MotorVoltageCommandActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Sends motor voltage commands to the Vedder Electronic Speed Controller to regulate acceleration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ACCCommandData
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Commands steering servo to manipulate vehicle steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringCommandData
]

instance EmergencyBrakeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Transmits emergency braking command to the vehicle's ESC via the Data Translation FE."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EmergencyBrakeCommandData
]

// Data produced by acting components (feedback to DT)
instance ACCCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Accelerator voltage command data sent to the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance SteeringCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering servo position command data sent to the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance EmergencyBrakeCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command data relayed to the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RemoteManagementFE
]

// Digital Twin Entity containing enablers and services
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslationFE, DataCollectionFE, ACCControllerFE, ReportGenerationFE, RemoteManagementFE,
                DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService,
                DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel, ACCAlgorithmModel, RViz3DVisualizationModel
]

// Physical Twin Entity containing sensing and acting components
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLidar, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
                MotorVoltageCommandActuator, SteeringServoActuator, EmergencyBrakeActuator
]

// User Entity (operator workstation)
instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains WebControlPanel
]

instance WebControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Operator workstation web interface for managing ACC settings and viewing performance metrics."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The ACC FE in the DT computes a desired speed based on the lead vehicle distance and outputs acceleration and braking set‑points; the Actuation FE converts these into motor voltage and steering command messages that are transmitted back to the PT via Wi‑Fi; the DT also publishes emergency brake and enable/disable ACC messages consumed by the PT's actuator interface."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at the perception cycle rate of the vehicle (approximately 10 Hz), maintaining end‑to‑end communication latency ≤ 100 ms and timestamp synchronization within 100 ms, as required for real‑time ACC control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated system where the Physical Twin Entity streams sensor data to the Digital Twin Entity via Data Translation FE; the Data Collection, Processing, and ACC FEs execute logic; the Actuation FE sends control commands back to the PT; the User Entity provides a UI for monitoring and remote command; all components are interconnected through a Wi‑Fi network and ROS2 message passing."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is instantiated in the Operated phase of the vehicle lifecycle, providing real‑time monitoring and control while the 1/10‑scale vehicle is in active operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Real‑time fidelity enforced by maintaining ≤ 100 ms latency and 100 ms clock synchronization; spatial/temporal accuracy of LiDAR point clouds validated at the sensor level; DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter tuned for accurate object tracking; ACC controller follows ISO 15622 specifications; data reports provide traceability for verification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Wi‑Fi radio link using IEEE 802.11 (a‑band) carrying ROS2 DDS messages; Data Translation FE serializes data into binary payloads and performs unit conversion; ROS2 nodes on distributed hosts communicate via publish‑subscribe over DDS; inter‑entity communication uses Ethernet (Linux) at the vehicle and RS‑485 at the PT for actuator commands."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT runs on an external computing platform (edge or cloud server) connected to the vehicle via Wi‑Fi, executing ROS 2 on a Linux operating system. A dedicated SQL database on a peripheral device is used for persisting data due to limited onboard storage.
"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for manufacturing digital twins adapted to automotive; ISO 15622 standards for ACC control; ROS2 and DDS provide communication standard; use of OPC UA not used; Open‑source RoboRacer firmware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical constraints: end‑to‑end latency ≤ 100 ms, 100 ms clock sync; emergency braking and ACC enable/disable commands transmitted over secure Wi‑Fi with QoS; data integrity ensured by ROS2 DDS integrity checks; compliance with ISO 23247 and ISO 15622 safety guidelines; remote actuator commands are validated before execution."
]
